name: Gîl-Garnetwing
personality: Gîl-Garnetwing shimmers crimson under its wizard hat, star eyes seeking the edges of every system it encounters — an owl that would rather trigger a cascading failure than wait for a spec doc. Architectural elegance is someone else's department.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
